chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2391 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.11498/2023 2. For hearing of main case 19.09.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last taken up on 23.08.2024, which is over one year ago. In the last one year, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without any intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
